title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sanji as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear it!! A beautiful woman is begging to be saved!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's do it, no one will know-)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I beg of you, please stop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's in trouble!! Is this what sexual harassment is like in Wano!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A woman, powerless against the desires of a powerful- man, that the 'belt of her Kimono:: Undone»...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It isn't just her clothes that she is about to lose! With each spin, she comes closer and "closer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HANG IN THERE!! I'll SAVE YOU NOW!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And with this, we have another naive warrior of justice in the bag...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's "BLACK LEG SANJ!" of the strawhat crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DANN IT... IT WAS A TRAP....!! Manages

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with a bounty of 330 million!! He's a 8/1G shot-)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Untie me!! I'm short on time!! If you do it now, I can still overlook this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please don't...I'd rather this banquet hall not become a battlefield like the other places.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know, I have a soft spot for foul mouthed boys like you!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get this off me!!...How I feel about a broad like you!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Where did Sanji run off to?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure... He ran off with a very enraged look...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
